headline: BRMSTE FOUNDRY · MEMPOOL OWNERSHIP

ownership.declaration: The BRMSTE FOUNDRY mempool instance and its Lightning node are owned and operated by BRMSTE LTD — the explorer alias is BRMSTE FOUNDRY, never UNKNOWN

honesty: Public ownership declaration only — node pubkey, macaroons, and MEMPOOL_API_KEY remain in Fort Knox (~/.brmste) and as wrangler secrets, never in git or substrate
signing: CURSOR NEVER SIGNS · EDGE SIGNS · FINAL SIGN human pen · Shravan Bansal
